blockers: Niche cannot support 8 verified product images — most of the guide is software, and only one marine hardware item (Quest 3) has a verified photo. candidateForCertification is false by design.

notes: Author = curator (Gus Calder). Verdict-first opening (best software + realistic hardware expectation). Software comparison table (eSail V3 / Sailaway III / MarineVerse Sailing Club) with a 'hardware that helps' column. Corrected stale facts vs prior draft: eSail V3 launched May 12 2026 with tidal heights in the new 'Trade Islands' area (was 'Tidal Explorer'); MarineVerse Cup renamed MarineVerse Sailing Club. Dropped unverifiable 'NauticalMind' (a bookstore, not a sim) and substituted the real adjacent title NAUTIS Home as honest ship-handling context. Exactly 2 fences (frontmatter). Both embedded images verified: hero /images/marine/best-sailing-sim-setup-2026.jpg (bay-hero, on disk) and /images/gear/marine/meta-quest-3-marineverse-vr.jpg (in verified-product-images.json). Software titles use official/store links (Steam, Meta Store), not forced Amazon; the sole Amazon href is the Quest 3 hardware gearpick with rel=sponsored nofollow noopener. Two tip callouts + one forum callout (original), warnings section (VR comfort/motion, no plug-and-play, FFB wasted, niche quirks), and a numbered setup path. astro build verified clean.
